title: the_better_allay_bamboo_allay
description:
These is a new allay named bamboo allay.

This mod was made using MCreator.

Please subscribe me on Bilibili.
body:
——Unless there is a vicious BUG,Otherwise, it will not be updated (if there is a BUG,Please chat with the author in the private message interface of Bilibili)

This mod adds a creature: bamboo allay **Are you sure it's not a piglin?**

Use bamboo to her **and her setting is a girl's** right click, you can exchange the loot in the Jungle Temple, Desert Temple, or reward box, and gain 5 experience, but each exchange has a 5-minute cooldown (if you insist on trading at this time, you will swallow bamboo)

If you kill her, you will suffer Heavenly Punishment (Lightning Struck while gaining a long Slowness and Jump boost)

When you place 4 diamonds, 4 bamboos, and a jukebox on your crafting table, you will synthesize its creatures' item forms and gain progress [bamboo allay! Elves from nature!] (Parent: Find a Good Friend in Farming), after release, if your mode is not Creative mode, the bamboo allay in item form will enter a cooldown of 600 ticks (30 seconds).

Can you subscribe me on Bilibili?
[https://space.bilibili.com/417059009?spm_id_from=333.337.0.0](https://space.bilibili.com/417059009?spm_id_from=333.337.0.0)

Questions about the use of mod content:
I don't know the specifics of the protocol, so feel free to use the mod models in the case of non-commercial, tagging my name, and of course, I treat them as my children, and I don't want you to hurt them
